asserts.note: handling-targets v1 Hatch Lift-off oversteer yaw overshoot <=15 deg, damped within 1.0 s (FWD mild tuck-in, existing band reused verbatim). v1 -- pre-measurement

liftoff pass shape: no spin. DOC GAP: testing-harness.md §6.2 lists spunOut's applicable maneuvers as 'skidpad' only -- semantically applicable to liftoff too, and the table could be extended to cover it
sanity ceiling only (NaN/runaway guard) -- not a handling-targets band
completion sanity only (did-not-stick guard), NOT a measurement of the 1.0 s damping window -- see report: no dedicated liftoff time-to-settle field exists in the frozen telemetry contract
standing invariant audit (target 0)

handling-targets v1 Coupe Lift-off oversteer yaw overshoot 20-35 deg, damped within 1.2 s, never past 220 deg -- the archetypal RWD sports-car trait, existing band reused verbatim. 'never past 220' is trivially satisfied by this band (35 << 220) so no separate assert added. v1 -- pre-measurement
liftoff pass shape: no spin. DOC GAP: same as hatch entry -- spunOut documented only against skidpad in §6.2
sanity ceiling only -- not a handling-targets band
completion sanity only, not a damping-time measurement (see report)
standing invariant audit (target 0)

handling-targets v1 Kart Lift-off oversteer yaw overshoot <=20 deg, damped within 0.8 s, never past 220 deg -- directly grounded in the 'Tame the kart' fix (13f3d14), effectively a regression check. Existing band reused verbatim. v1 -- pre-measurement
liftoff pass shape: no spin. DOC GAP: same as hatch entry
sanity ceiling only -- not a handling-targets band
completion sanity only, not a damping-time measurement (see report)
standing invariant audit (target 0)

handling-targets v1 Pickup Lift-off oversteer yaw overshoot <=20 deg, damped within 1.3 s, never past 220 deg -- softened slow push-then-rotate from the gradual offroad lateral curve. Existing band reused verbatim. v1 -- pre-measurement
liftoff pass shape: no spin. DOC GAP: same as hatch entry
sanity ceiling only -- not a handling-targets band
completion sanity only, not a damping-time measurement (see report)
standing invariant audit (target 0)
